nodes.label: RAG Pipeline
nodes.content: Retrieval-Augmented Generation combines vector search with LLM synthesis. Documents are chunked, embedded, and stored in a vector database for semantic retrieval.

nodes.label: Embeddings
nodes.content: Dense vector representations of text chunks. Similar meaning maps to nearby vectors — search uses cosine distance or dot product in high-dimensional space.

nodes.label: Vector Database
nodes.content: Specialized store for approximate nearest neighbor search — Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector, Chroma, etc.

nodes.label: Document Chunking
nodes.content: Splitting source documents into retrievable units. Strategies: fixed-size, semantic, recursive, parent-child.

nodes.label: Reranker
nodes.content: Cross-encoder or LLM-based reranking improves retrieval precision after initial vector search.

nodes.label: GraphRAG
nodes.content: Microsoft's approach: build a knowledge graph from documents, use community detection for global queries.

nodes.label: React Three Fiber
nodes.content: React renderer for Three.js. Declarative 3D scenes with hooks, perfect for interactive knowledge graph visualization.

nodes.label: Force-Directed Layout
nodes.content: Physics simulation places connected nodes close together and repels unrelated nodes — ideal for exploring graph structure in 3D.

nodes.label: NL Scene Editing
nodes.content: Natural language commands parsed by LLM into structured scene operations: move, highlight, filter, cluster.

nodes.label: Bidirectional Sync
nodes.content: Scene edits emit events back to the host app, which can update the vector store or knowledge graph.
